query: How many organisations are currently listed as signatories on the EU General-Purpose AI Code of Practice signatory page (digital-strategy.ec.europa.eu/en/policies/ai-code-practice) as of July 2026? List the count and names if possible.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

**As of July 2026, the official EU General-Purpose AI Code of Practice signatory list shows 23 organisations as full signatories, plus xAI as a partial (Safety-only) signatory — so 23 or 24 depending on how xAI is counted.**

Key points:
- The signatory list is actually hosted on the **`contents-code-gpai`** page, not the main `ai-code-practice` landing page (which only describes the Code).
- The page was **last updated 23 April 2026** and is maintained as a living document.

**The 23 full signatories:** Accexible, AI Studio Delta, Aleph Alpha, Almawave, Amazon, Anthropic, Black Forest Labs, Bria AI, Cohere, Domyn, Dweve, Fastweb, Google, IBM, Lawise, LINAGORA, Microsoft, Mistral AI, Open Hippo, OpenAI, Pleias, ServiceNow, WRITER — plus **xAI** (Safety and Security Chapter only).

One caveat worth flagging for the forecasting caller: at the initial launch (1 Aug 2025) the Commission reported ~26 companies, but the current on-page named list stands at 23 full + xAI. Because the Commission updates the list continuously, exact counts fluctuate over time.

sources.title: The General-Purpose AI Code of Practice | Shaping Europe's digital future
sources.snippet: Official signatories section lists 23 full signatories plus xAI (Safety and Security Chapter only); page last updated 23 April 2026 with note that the list is continuously updated.

sources.title: AI Code of Practice policy page | Shaping Europe's digital future
sources.snippet: Describes the Code and its development but does not host the signatory list itself; ~1000 stakeholders participated in drafting.

sources.title: General-Purpose AI Code of Practice - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: GPAI CoP released 10 July 2025; supports compliance with EU AI Act Articles 53 and 55; obligations applied from 2 August 2025.

sources.title: Some 26 tech companies sign up to EU Commission's AI Code
sources.snippet: Some 26 companies were among the first to sign up to the AI Code of Practice on General-Purpose AI, per the Commission (1 August 2025).

sources.title: AI Office invites providers to sign the GPAI Code of Practice
sources.snippet: Signatories will be publicly listed on 1 August 2025, ahead of AI Act GPAI obligations entering application on 2 August 2025.

sources.title: European Commission publishes full list of AI companies signed up to Code of Practice
sources.snippet: Reports (11 August 2025) that the European Commission published the full list of AI companies signed up to the Code of Practice.

data_points.metric: Full signatories listed on official GPAI Code of Practice page
Partial signatories (Safety and Security Chapter only, i.e. xAI)
Companies reported signed at initial public listing
